checkedClaims.claimText: Experiment 6 asks a narrower question than full theory induction: when the trace is genuinely unseen or hybrid, does the frontier behave like a healthy open-set uncertainty mechanism rather than a forced closed-set commitment [SCHEIRER-2013]?
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: experiment 6 asks a narrower question than full theory induction when the trace is genuinely unseen or hybrid does the frontier behave like a healthy open-set uncertainty mechanism rather than a forced closed-set commitment scheirer-2013
